zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Plumpton於1239年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾時，他的父親Nigel de Plumpton23歲，母親Hawise Clare60歲。他於大約1266年與Lady Isabella Westwick在英國英格蘭越可爾格拉辛頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1298年之前在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Plumpton was born in 1239, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nigel de Plumpton, was 23 and his mother, Hawise Clare, was 60. He married Lady Isabella Westwick about 1266, in Grassington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 1298, in England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Lady Isabella Westwick environ 1266, à Grassington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 1298, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Plumpton(이)가 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nigel de Plumpton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Clare(은)는 60세였다. 그는 대략 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그래징턴에서 Lady Isabella Westwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1298년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Plumpton родился в 1239 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nigel de Plumpton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise Clare, 60. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabella Westwick около 1266 г. в местности грассингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 1298 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
